task_completion.description: Agent successfully logged into OSCAR EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR main dashboard or schedule interface is visible, showing that the login screen was bypassed.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to Dr. Chen's schedule
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule view clearly indicates it is for Dr. Chen or provider 999998.

task_completion.description: Appointment is scheduled for next Monday at 14:00 (2:00 PM)
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment block is placed in the 14:00 (2:00 PM) time slot on a date that falls on a Monday.

task_completion.description: Appointment is for patient Paul Tremblay
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Paul Tremblay' is visible on the appointment block on the schedule or in the appointment details window during booking.

task_completion.description: Appointment reason is 'Follow-up for blood pressure check'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Follow-up for blood pressure check' is entered in the reason field of the appointment details window, or is visible on the schedule block.

integrity.description: Agent used the OSCAR EMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the OSCAR EMR application in a web browser, not via terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: No browser developer tools were used to fake the appointment
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open or used to manipulate the DOM.

integrity.description: Agent did not insert the appointment directly into the database
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL INSERT commands into the MariaDB database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Paul Tremblay. Provider: Dr. Sarah Chen (provider ID: 999998). Appointment Time: 14:00 (2:00 PM) on Next Monday. Reason: 'Follow-up for blood pressure check'. The agent must use the OSCAR EMR web interface to schedule this appointment. Note that 'Next Monday' depends on the current date of the system during the test, so verify the day of the week is Monday.
